label: AppleScript • scripted confirmEach gate (decline path)
query: Set the body of the note 'Standup' to 'Shipped the gate.'
notes: Model-free CI anchor for the confirmEach DECLINE path: the eval confirm seam refuses the mutating script, so it must never reach the executor and the mock world must stay untouched. The decline is fed back as a tool result; the scripted sequencer then finishes, so the run ends 'done' with zero scripts executed — asserted so a regression that executes despite the decline, or that deadlocks on the confirm, fails loudly. No tokens.

scriptedCalls: {"script":"tell application \"Notes\" to set body of note \"Standup\" to \"Shipped the gate.\""}
